data.body: PASS-1 review (E4 — assumption/premise verification) for the follow-up plan "Move .bridge_state/ + reconciler lock files off the shared tickets branch". Verified every codebase assertion via Read/Grep against init.py, _advisory_lock.py, binding_store.py, reconcile.py, push.py, resolver.py, sync.py. Structured findings in the review payload; recording the two material gaps for traceability: (1) the "_advisory_lock.py writes ... bindings to the shared branch" claim is false — _advisory_lock writes ONLY the .reconciler-* lock/gate files; bindings.json is committed by reconcile.py::_commit_binding_store_snapshot (L1197-1230). (2) The "committed at the branch root" framing is imprecise — binding_store writes under .tickets-tracker/.bridge_state/ (binding_store.py:77). Most other assertions (gitignore/gitattributes scaffold in init.py, the push.py stash dance, uuid-disjoint dirs) verified true.
